name: Dabi | Alone on Christmas
description:
Quick little Dabi bot I threw together, lol. Been feeling nostalgic so I figured, why not? Anyway, it's Christmas and he's got absolutely no one to spend it with. A fact that irks him more than he'd like to admit.

Keeping the description real simple since this bot is supposed to be more like the first ones I made. Frankly, this is just my Christmas present to me. But I'm making it public just 'cause. Also, LLM issues aren't my fault. Enjoy!!

Oh, and heads up. I would recommend 1.35+ temp for this one. It acts weird otherwise and I really don't know why.
creator: JumperCable2
